rationale: Educ. Code §43.015 governs the comptroller's duties regarding the permanent and available school funds—reporting, custody of securities, and warrant processing. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue levels, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: the comptroller shall report to the governor the condition of the permanent school fund and the available school fund, the amount of each fund, and the manner of its disbursement.
_note: No operative provision in §43.015 references homestead exemptions, property tax rates, or school funding formulas tied to exemption amounts. Indirect fiscal impact on school funds is possible but does not constitute a statutory conflict with this provision.
